tasks.title: Implement ticket assignment endpoint
tasks.description: Add PATCH /api/tickets/:id/assignee handler that validates payload, updates the ticket in the store, and returns the updated ticket or appropriate error codes.
tasks.design_notes: Use existing validation utilities (e.g., Zod) and return 200 with the updated ticket to keep response shape consistent across APIs.

tasks.title: Add assignment logic to MemoryTicketStore
tasks.description: Extend MemoryTicketStore to support updating a ticket's assignee field while preserving in‑memory state and emitting events for consistency.
tasks.design_notes: Implement a new method assignTicket(id, assignee) adhering to the TicketStore interface for easy swapping with other stores.

tasks.title: Create assignment UI controls in React
tasks.description: Build a dropdown of agents and an Assign button in the ticket detail view, calling the shared API client to PATCH the assignee.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage the existing shared/api.ts client for type‑safe calls and update local state on success to avoid a full reload.

tasks.title: Write tests for assignment flow
tasks.description: Add Vitest/Supertest cases covering successful assignment, validation failures, and 401/403 when not authorized.
tasks.design_notes: Mock the MemoryTicketStore and reuse existing test setup to keep test suite fast and deterministic.

tasks.title: Build SQLiteTicketStore with migrations
tasks.description: Create a SQLite-backed TicketStore implementation, schema migrations, and seed logic mirroring the in‑memory data shape.
tasks.design_notes: Use the 'better-sqlite3' library for synchronous queries and store migration scripts under a new db/migrations folder.

tasks.title: Wire server to use configurable TicketStore
tasks.description: Introduce an environment variable to select between MemoryTicketStore and SQLiteTicketStore at startup and inject the chosen store into the Express app.
tasks.design_notes: Apply the factory pattern in server/app.ts to keep store selection isolated from route definitions.

tasks.title: Implement admin auth middleware and protect audit routes
tasks.description: Complete the placeholder auth middleware to verify JWT admin claims and reject non‑admin requests with 403 on audit‑related endpoints.
tasks.design_notes: Reuse existing auth utils, add role checking, and register the middleware only on /api/audit routes.

tasks.title: Add audit log endpoint and frontend panel
tasks.description: Create GET /api/audit that returns recent audit entries from SQLite and display them in a new admin‑only panel in the React dashboard.
tasks.design_notes: Persist audit records via a dedicated SQLiteAuditLog table and conditionally render the panel based on user.role === 'admin'.

commits.summary: Update .gitignore to ignore web/node_modules and devdive.json
Add project scaffolding: .env.example, CI workflow, .gitignore, and README
